Default Prove Up In Scd. #218 At 9:00 A.M.
Off Calendar Sep-08-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maria torreano.
Appearances:
Michael Marquez, Esq. for Plaintiff Farmers Insurance Exchange.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant Marcus richardson.
Principal of $100,000.00
Costs of $315.00
Interest from Oct. 13, 2002 at the rate of 10%.
Counsel to prepare Judgment.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: Sajja Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Patty Dowling.
Plaintiff represented by counsel, Michael Marquez, request for a continuance.
Court ordered the matter off calendar. Plaintiffs to reset a new date for the default prove up hearing, when all defendants defaulted and the judgment has been entered.
